title: melandrium scopulorum
intro: Melandrium scopulorum, also known as Alpine Catchfly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Melandrium scopulorum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
